Name|ForEach-Object{[ordered]@{name=$_.Name;enabled=[bool]$_.Enabled}});if($profiles.Count-ne3-or@($profiles|Where-Object{!$_.enabled}).Count-ne0){throw 'firewall profile precondition SilentlyContinue);$jobs=@(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $root 'jobs') -Filter '*.json' -File|ForEach-Object{Get-Content -LiteralPath $_.FullName -Raw|ConvertFrom-Json});$scheduled=@(Get-ScheduledTask|Where-Object{$_.TaskName -like '*Nora*' -or $_.TaskPath -like -in @('launch-requested','launched','bootstrap-confirmed','running')}).Count;pending_job_count=@($jobs|Where-Object{$_.state -in @('prepared','launch-requested','launched','bootstrap-confirmed','running','contained')}).Count;prepared_job_count=@($jobs|Where-Object{$_.state -eq postflight_verification_command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop';$root='C:\NoraEvidence\Phase2';$e=Join-Path $root 'qualification-frt1r2-live-20260717T192223Z';$result=Get-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $e 'qualification-result.json') -Raw|ConvertFrom-Json;$cleanup=Get-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $e 'containment-frt1r2-live-20260717T192223Z-cleanup.json') -Raw|ConvertFrom-Json;$profiles=@(Get-NetFirewallProfile -PolicyStore ActiveStore|Sort-Object Name|ForEach-Object{[ordered]@{name=$_.Name;enabled=[bool]$_.Enabled}});$tester=Get-NetFirewallRule -Name disabled'};$nora=@(Get-NetFirewallRule|Where-Object{$_.Name -like 'NoraPhase2Containment-*' -or $_.Group -like 'NoraPhase2Containment-*'});$proc=@(Get-Process terminal64,metatester64 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue);$jobs=@(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $root 'jobs') -Filter '*.json' -File|ForEach-Object{Get-Content -LiteralPath $_.FullName SHA256).Hash.ToLowerInvariant()}|ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12

expected_results.second_cleanup: repository-owned cleanup must return pass with removed_rule_count=0 if run manually

manual_run_instructions: Do not continue unless every precondition passes.
Run the live qualification command exactly once.
If qualification fails or leaves a rule, run the emergency cleanup command once.
Return the complete outputs to the coordinating chat.
Never retry with the same qualification ID.
